purpose: Second local Canny v5 robustness sample using the current eye-fill/open-shadow prompt candidate with a distinct seed.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture, realistic eyes with clean catchlights, clear iris detail, gentle eye fill light, open shadow detail, detailed hair, edge-guided composition, coherent silhouette, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, edge artifacts, harsh outlines, colored blotches, paint marks, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, control map stains, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso
